placeholder.new_listing: e.g. 123 Main St, Pasadena. 3bd 2ba, $1.2M. Modern reno, walk to Old Town.
placeholder.open_house: e.g. 123 Main St, Saturday 1-4pm. Light bites + coffee, brand-new kitchen.
placeholder.price_drop: e.g. 123 Main St — down from $1.45M to $1.39M. Motivated seller.
placeholder.just_sold: e.g. Closed 123 Main St in 14 days, multiple offers. Repeat client.
placeholder.market_update: e.g. Inventory in Pasadena up 18% MoM, rates eased below 6.5%. Buyers are back.
placeholder.testimonial: e.g. Sarah said "Mike made the whole process easy — closed in under 30 days, $15k off asking."
placeholder.custom: Describe the post — angle, tone, anything specific to include.
placeholder.by_address: Paste a listing URL (Zillow / Redfin / MLS) or just type an address.

brief.picked_subject_hint: Anchored to a CRM record. AI will only use facts you typed — edit above if you want different ones.

empty.new_listing: No listings from the last 60 days. Try the Custom trigger.
empty.open_house: No open houses in the next 21 days. Schedule one first.
empty.price_drop: No active listings to re-price. Add or activate a listing.
empty.just_sold: No closings in the last 60 days.
empty.default: Nothing to pick — type your brief directly.

lookup.input_placeholder: 123 Main St, Pasadena CA — or paste a Zillow / Redfin / MLS URL
lookup.error_too_short: Paste an address or a listing URL first.
lookup.not_found: Not in our database — using what you typed
lookup.hint: Edit the brief below before generating — the AI grounds the caption on whatever you leave there.

image.permission_library_denied: Photo library access denied. Enable it in Settings → LeadSmart.
image.permission_camera_denied: Camera access denied. Enable it in Settings → LeadSmart.

errors.brief_required_default: Add a brief — what's the address, the angle, anything special?
errors.brief_required_synthetic: Tell me what the post should be about.
errors.brief_required_by_address: Paste an address or URL above and tap Look up first, or type a brief below.

schedule_box.instagram_needs_image: Instagram requires an image. Attach one above.
schedule_box.future_clamp: Pick a time at least 1 minute from now.
schedule_box.hint: Cron picks up due posts every 5 minutes. Actual publish may land up to 5 min after your chosen time.

recurring_box.ig_needs_image: Instagram recurring posts require an image. Attach one above.
recurring_box.hint: Materialize cron creates a scheduled post about an hour before each fire time. Pause or cancel anytime from the Recurring screen.

actions.ig_needs_image_publish: Instagram posts require an image. Attach one above.

helper.and_post_personal_feed: and we'll post to your personal feed.
helper.with_ig_business: with a linked Instagram Business account.
helper.instagram_needs_image_attach: Instagram requires an image — attach one above to enable direct publish.
helper.instagram_publish_note: Posts go to your linked Instagram Business account. Make sure you're happy with the caption + image before tapping Publish.
helper.facebook_publish_note: Posts go straight to your connected Facebook Page. Manage connections from
helper.linkedin_publish_note: Posts go to your personal LinkedIn feed. Manage connections from
helper.share_only_note: Share / Copy into the {{platform}} app. Direct publish for {{platform}} is coming soon.
